title: penstemon strictus subsp. strictoformis
intro: Penstemon strictus subsp. strictoformis, also known as Rocky Mountain penstemon, is a perennial plant species in the plantain family that is native to the mountainous regions of the western United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Penstemon strictus subsp. strictoformis are thought to include wound healing, reduced inflammation, and improved respiratory health, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, have been used to support the immune system and alleviate symptoms of colds and respiratory infections.
